validators.name: agent-review
validators.rubric: Review the produced code artifact for exact task fidelity, correctness, and scope control. Pass only if the artifact satisfies the submitted task, keeps edits tightly scoped, and preserves fallback behavior when the preferred runtime is unavailable.

nodes.description: Add runtime preference support to the task contracts. Update project/contracts/Contracts.Core/Messages.cs so task nodes and dispatch requests can carry a preferred runtime id. Preserve existing behavior when no preferred runtime is specified. Edit only the contract file unless a compile fix is strictly required.

Update only project/plugins/Plugin.Actors/DispatchActor.cs so bidder selection prefers agents whose runtime matches the task's preferred runtime id when such bids are available. Assume the contract fields already exist from the predecessor task. Keep fallback behavior intact when no preferred-runtime bid is available. Do not modify any contract or test file. If you believe a contract change is required, return failure_reason instead of editing another file.

Edit only project/tests/Plugin.Actors.Tests/DispatchActorTests.cs to prove: preferred runtime wins when available; non-preferred runtime still wins when no preferred-runtime bid exists; existing duplicate/non-capable bid protections still hold. Assume the contract and dispatch-selection tasks have already completed. Do not modify production code. If the production behavior is insufficient, return failure_reason instead of editing any non-test file.

Update project/tools/RealCliParallelSmoke/Program.cs so the mixed-runtime smoke submits alternating pi and kimi preferred tasks and verifies each completed task was handled by the preferred runtime when capacity allowed. Keep the existing parallel capacity verification.

Review the Feature 1 changes for consistency across contracts, dispatch selection, tests, and the mixed-runtime smoke tool. Tighten any small inconsistencies needed for the batch to build and verify cleanly.
